revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:September 7 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of September 7 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦9月7日'''は[[旧暦]][[9月 (旧暦)|9月]]の7日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[治承]]4年（[[1180年]]_月_日） - 木曾の[[源義仲]]が[[平家]]討伐の兵を挙げる * [[元久]]元年（[[1204年]]_月_日） - 源千幡が[[征夷大将軍]]に任ぜられ、名を[[源実朝|実朝]]と改める * [[建治]]元年（[[1275年]]_月_日） - 鎌倉幕府執権・[[北条時宗]]が、入貢を要求した[[元 (王朝)|元]]の使者5人を斬殺 * [[明治]]5年（[[1872年]]_月_日） - 東京～京都間に[[電信]]線が開通
== 誕生日 == * [[延暦]]5年（[[786年]]_月_日） - [[嵯峨天皇]]、52代[[天皇]]（+ [[842年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[寛永]]6年（[[1629年]]_月_日） - [[原マルチノ]]（原丸知野）、[[イエズス会]]司祭・[[天正遣欧使節]]副使 * [[宝暦]]元年（[[1751年]]_月_日） - [[並木宗輔]]、[[浄瑠璃]]作者（* [[1695年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]13年（[[1816年]]_月_日） - [[山東京伝]]、[[戯作家]]（* [[1761年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[9月6日 (旧暦)|9月6日]] 翌日[[9月8日 (旧暦)|9月8日]] - 前月[[8月7日 (旧暦)|8月7日]] 翌月[[10月7日 (旧暦)|10月7日]] *新暦[[9月7日]]
{{msg:stub}}

'''旧暦9月7日'''は[[旧暦]][[9月 (旧暦)|9月]]の7日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。

== 誕生日 == * [[延暦]]5年（[[786年]]_月_日） - [[嵯峨天皇]]、52代[[天皇]]（+ [[842年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[寛永]]6年（[[1629年]]_月_日） - [[原マルチノ]]（原丸知野）、[[イエズス会]]司祭・[[天正遣欧使節]]副使 * [[宝暦]]元年（[[1751年]]_月_日） - [[並木宗輔]]、[[浄瑠璃]]作者（* [[1695年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]13年（[[1816年]]_月_日） - [[山東京伝]]、[[戯作家]]（* [[1761年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[9月6日 (旧暦)|9月6日]] 翌日[[9月8日 (旧暦)|9月8日]] - 前月[[8月7日 (旧暦)|8月7日]] 翌月[[10月7日 (旧暦)|10月7日]] *新暦[[9月7日]]

'''旧暦9月7日'''は[[旧暦]][[9月 (旧暦)|9月]]の7日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[治承]]4年（[[1180年]][[10月4日]]） - 木曾の[[源義仲]]が[[平家]]討伐の兵を挙げる * [[元久]]元年（[[1204年]][[10月8日]]） - 源千幡が[[征夷大将軍]]に任ぜられ、名を[[源実朝|実朝]]と改める * [[建治]]元年（[[1275年]][[10月4日]]） - 鎌倉幕府執権・[[北条時宗]]が、入貢を要求した[[元 (王朝)|元]]の使者5人を斬殺 * [[明治]]5年（[[1872年]][[10月9日]]） - 東京～京都間に[[電信]]線が開通
== 誕生日 == * [[延暦]]5年（[[786年]][[10月7日]]） - [[嵯峨天皇]]、52代[[天皇]]（+ [[842年]]） * [[永正]]8年（[[1511年]][[9月28日]]）- [[松平清康]]、戦国時代の[[武将]]、[[徳川家康]]の祖父（+ [[1535年]]）

== 記念日・年中行事 == * カジマヤー祝い - [[沖縄]]では、数え年の97歳の長寿祝いに風車（カジマヤー）を持たせて祝う

{{stub}}

{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月7日'''は[[旧暦]][[9月 (旧暦)|9月]]の7日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[治承]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1180年]][[9月27日]]） - 木曾の[[源義仲]]が[[平家]]討伐の兵を挙げる * [[元久]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1204年]][[10月1日]]） - 源千幡が[[征夷大将軍]]に任ぜられ、名を[[源実朝|実朝]]と改める * [[建治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1275年]][[9月27日]]） - 鎌倉幕府執権・[[北条時宗]]が、入貢を要求した[[元 (王朝)|元]]の使者5人を斬殺 * [[安政]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1858年]][[10月13日]]） - [[安政の大獄]]による捕縛開始 * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[10月9日]]） - 東京～京都間に[[電信]]線が開通
== 誕生日 == * [[延暦]]5年（ユリウス暦[[786年]][[10月3日]]） - [[嵯峨天皇]]、52代[[天皇]]（+ [[842年]]） * [[永正]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1511年]][[9月28日]]）- [[松平清康]]、戦国時代の[[武将]]、[[徳川家康]]の祖父（+ [[1535年]]） * [[寛政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1799年]][[10月5日]]）- [[箕作阮甫]]、蘭学者（＋ [[1863年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[寛永]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1629年]][[10月23日]]） - [[原マルチノ]]（原丸知野）、[[イエズス会]]司祭・[[天正遣欧使節]]副使 * [[宝暦]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1751年]][[10月25日]]） - [[並木宗輔]]、[[浄瑠璃]]作者（* [[1695年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1816年]][[10月27日]]） - [[山東京伝]]、[[戯作家]]（* [[1761年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 == * カジマヤー祝い - [[沖縄]]では、数え年の97歳の長寿祝いに風車（カジマヤー）を持たせて祝う

== できごと == * [[治承]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1180年]][[9月27日]]） - 木曾の[[源義仲]]が[[平家]]討伐の兵を挙げる * [[元久]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1204年]][[10月1日]]） - 源千幡が[[征夷大将軍]]に任ぜられ、名を[[源実朝|実朝]]と改める * [[建治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1275年]][[9月27日]]） - [[鎌倉幕府]]執権・[[北条時宗]]が、入貢を要求した[[元 (王朝)|元]]の使者5人を斬殺 * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[10月9日]]） - 東京～京都間に[[電信|電信線]]が開通
== 誕生日 == * [[延暦]]5年（ユリウス暦[[786年]][[10月3日]]） - [[嵯峨天皇]]、52代[[天皇]]（+ [[842年]]） * [[永正]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1511年]][[9月28日]]）- [[松平清康]]、[[戦国時代 (日本)|戦国時代]]の[[武将]]、[[徳川家康]]の祖父（+ [[1535年]]） * [[寛政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1799年]][[10月5日]]）- [[箕作阮甫]]、蘭学者（＋ [[1863年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[寛永]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1629年]][[10月23日]]） - [[原マルチノ]]（原丸知野）、[[イエズス会]]司祭・[[天正遣欧使節]]副使 * [[宝暦]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1751年]][[10月25日]]） - [[並木宗輔]]、[[浄瑠璃]]作者（* [[1695年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1816年]][[10月27日]]） - [[山東京伝]]、[[戯作家]]（* [[1761年]]）

== できごと == * [[治承]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1180年]][[9月27日]]） - 木曾の[[源義仲]]が[[平家]]討伐の兵を挙げる * [[建仁]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1203年]][[10月13日]]） - 源千幡が[[征夷大将軍]]に任ぜられ、名を[[源実朝|実朝]]と改める * [[建治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1275年]][[9月27日]]） - [[鎌倉幕府]]執権・[[北条時宗]]が、入貢を要求した[[元 (王朝)|元]]の使者5人を斬殺 * [[慶長]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1600年]][[10月13日]]） - [[大津城]]に対して包囲攻撃を開始（[[大津城の戦い]]） * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[10月9日]]） - 東京～京都間に[[電信|電信線]]が開通
== 誕生日 == * [[延暦]]5年（ユリウス暦[[786年]][[10月3日]]） - [[嵯峨天皇]]、52代[[天皇]]（+ [[842年]]） * [[永正]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1511年]][[9月28日]]）- [[松平清康]]、[[戦国時代 (日本)|戦国時代]]の[[武将]]、[[徳川家康]]の祖父（+ [[1535年]]） * [[寛政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1799年]][[10月5日]]）- [[箕作阮甫]]、蘭学者（＋ [[1863年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[慶長]]19年（グレゴリオ暦[[1614年]][[10月10日]]） - [[千少庵]]、[[茶人]]（* [[1546年]]） * [[寛永]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1629年]][[10月23日]]） - [[原マルティノ]]、[[イエズス会]]司祭・[[天正遣欧使節]]副使 * [[寛文]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1668年]][[10月12日]]） - [[片山良庵]]、[[軍学者]]（* [[1601年]]） * [[宝暦]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1751年]][[10月25日]]） - [[並木宗輔]]、[[浄瑠璃]]作者（* [[1695年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1816年]][[10月27日]]） - [[山東京伝]]、[[戯作家]]（* [[1761年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 == * [[カジマヤー|カジマヤー祝い]] - [[沖縄県|沖縄]]では、数え年の97歳の長寿祝いに風車（カジマヤー）を持たせて祝う
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|6|9|8|8|7|10|9|0907}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:9月7日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[September 7 (Oldest Lunar Calendar)]] to [[September 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]: Text replacement - "Oldest Lunar Calendar" to "Old Lunar Calendar"

== 誕生日 == * [[延暦]]5年（ユリウス暦[[786年]][[10月3日]]） - [[嵯峨天皇]]、52代[[天皇]]（+ [[842年]]） * [[永正]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1511年]][[9月28日]]）- [[松平清康]]、[[戦国時代 (日本)|戦国時代]]の[[武将]]、[[徳川家康]]の祖父（+ [[1535年]]） * [[寛政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1799年]][[10月5日]]）- [[箕作阮甫]]、蘭学者（＋ [[1863年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[慶長]]19年（グレゴリオ暦[[1614年]][[10月10日]]） - [[千少庵]]、[[茶人]]（* [[1546年]]） * [[寛永]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1629年]][[10月23日]]） - [[原マルティノ]]、[[イエズス会]]司祭・[[天正遣欧使節]]副使 * [[寛文]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1668年]][[10月12日]]） - [[片山良庵]]、[[軍学者]]（* [[1601年]]） * [[宝暦]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1751年]][[10月25日]]） - [[並木宗輔]]、[[浄瑠璃]]作者（* [[1695年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1816年]][[10月27日]]） - [[山東京伝]]、[[戯作家]]（* [[1761年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 == * [[カジマヤー|カジマヤー祝い]] - [[沖縄県|沖縄]]では、数え年の97歳の長寿祝いに風車（カジマヤー）を持たせて祝う
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|6|9|8|8|7|10|9|0907}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:9月7日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

== 誕生日 == * [[延暦]]5年（ユリウス暦[[786年]][[10月3日]]） - [[嵯峨天皇]]、52代[[天皇]]（+ [[842年]]） * [[永正]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1511年]][[9月28日]]）- [[松平清康]]、[[戦国時代 (日本)|戦国時代]]の[[武将]]、[[徳川家康]]の祖父（+ [[1535年]]） * [[寛政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1799年]][[10月5日]]）- [[箕作阮甫]]、蘭学者（＋ [[1863年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[慶長]]19年（グレゴリオ暦[[1614年]][[10月10日]]） - [[千少庵]]、[[茶人]]（* [[1546年]]） * [[寛永]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1629年]][[10月23日]]） - [[原マルティノ]]、[[イエズス会]]司祭・[[天正遣欧使節]]副使 * [[寛文]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1668年]][[10月12日]]） - [[片山良庵]]、[[軍学者]]（* [[1601年]]） * [[宝暦]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1751年]][[10月25日]]） - [[並木宗輔]]、[[浄瑠璃]]作者（* [[1695年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1816年]][[10月27日]]） - [[山東京伝]]、[[戯作家]]（* [[1761年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 == * [[カジマヤー|カジマヤー祝い]] - [[沖縄県|沖縄]]では、数え年の97歳の長寿祝いに風車（カジマヤー）を持たせて祝う

Moving from [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] to [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding boilerplate intro to all the days
Text replacement - "六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]" to "六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]][[Category:先負]]"

revision.text:
'''September 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar September}} ''September 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)<!--Lunar September7-->きゅうれきくがつなのか）は[[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の7日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]][[Category:先負]]である。

'''September 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar September}} ''September 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)<!--Lunar September7-->きゅうれきくがつなのか）は[[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の7日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]][[Category:先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[治承]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1180年]][[9月27日]]） - 木曾の[[源義仲]]が[[平家]]討伐の兵を挙げる * [[建仁]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1203年]][[10月13日]]） - 源千幡が[[征夷大将軍]]に任ぜられ、名を[[源実朝|実朝]]と改める * [[建治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1275年]][[9月27日]]） - [[鎌倉幕府]]執権・[[北条時宗]]が、入貢を要求した[[元 (王朝)|元]]の使者5人を斬殺 * [[慶長]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1600年]][[10月13日]]） - [[大津城]]に対して包囲攻撃を開始（[[大津城の戦い]]） * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[10月9日]]） - 東京～京都間に[[電信|電信線]]が開通
== 誕生日 == * [[延暦]]5年（ユリウス暦[[786年]][[10月3日]]） - [[嵯峨天皇]]、52代[[天皇]]（+ [[842年]]） * [[永正]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1511年]][[9月28日]]）- [[松平清康]]、[[戦国時代 (日本)|戦国時代]]の[[武将]]、[[徳川家康]]の祖父（+ [[1535年]]） * [[寛政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1799年]][[10月5日]]）- [[箕作阮甫]]、蘭学者（＋ [[1863年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[慶長]]19年（グレゴリオ暦[[1614年]][[10月10日]]） - [[千少庵]]、[[茶人]]（* [[1546年]]） * [[寛永]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1629年]][[10月23日]]） - [[原マルティノ]]、[[イエズス会]]司祭・[[天正遣欧使節]]副使 * [[寛文]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1668年]][[10月12日]]） - [[片山良庵]]、[[軍学者]]（* [[1601年]]） * [[宝暦]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1751年]][[10月25日]]） - [[並木宗輔]]、[[浄瑠璃]]作者（* [[1695年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1816年]][[10月27日]]） - [[山東京伝]]、[[戯作家]]（* [[1761年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 == * [[カジマヤー|カジマヤー祝い]] - [[沖縄県|沖縄]]では、数え年の97歳の長寿祝いに風車（カジマヤー）を持たせて祝う
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|6|9|8|8|7|10|9|0907}}

== Births == * [[延暦]]5年（ユリウス暦[[786年]][[10月3日]]） - [[嵯峨天皇]]、52代[[天皇]]（+ [[842年]]） * [[永正]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1511年]][[9月28日]]）- [[松平清康]]、[[戦国時代 (日本)|戦国時代]]の[[武将]]、[[徳川家康]]の祖父（+ [[1535年]]） * [[寛政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1799年]][[10月5日]]）- [[箕作阮甫]]、蘭学者（＋ [[1863年]]）
== Deaths == * [[慶長]]19年（グレゴリオ暦[[1614年]][[10月10日]]） - [[千少庵]]、[[茶人]]（* [[1546年]]） * [[寛永]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1629年]][[10月23日]]） - [[原マルティノ]]、[[イエズス会]]司祭・[[天正遣欧使節]]副使 * [[寛文]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1668年]][[10月12日]]） - [[片山良庵]]、[[軍学者]]（* [[1601年]]） * [[宝暦]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1751年]][[10月25日]]） - [[並木宗輔]]、[[浄瑠璃]]作者（* [[1695年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1816年]][[10月27日]]） - [[山東京伝]]、[[戯作家]]（* [[1761年]]）

--> == Events == * [[治承]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1180年]][[9月27日]]） - 木曾の[[源義仲]]が[[平家]]討伐の兵を挙げる * [[建仁]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1203年]][[10月13日]]） - 源千幡が[[征夷大将軍]]に任ぜられ、名を[[源実朝|実朝]]と改める * [[建治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1275年]][[9月27日]]） - [[鎌倉幕府]]執権・[[北条時宗]]が、入貢を要求した[[元 (王朝)|元]]の使者5人を斬殺 * [[慶長]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1600年]][[10月13日]]） - [[大津城]]に対して包囲攻撃を開始（[[大津城の戦い]]） * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[10月9日]]） - 東京～京都間に[[電信|電信線]]が開通
== Births == * [[延暦]]5年（ユリウス暦[[786年]][[10月3日]]） - [[嵯峨天皇]]、52代[[天皇]]（+ [[842年]]） * [[永正]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1511年]][[9月28日]]）- [[松平清康]]、[[戦国時代 (日本)|戦国時代]]の[[武将]]、[[徳川家康]]の祖父（+ [[1535年]]） * [[寛政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1799年]][[10月5日]]）- [[箕作阮甫]]、蘭学者（＋ [[1863年]]）
== Deaths == * [[慶長]]19年（グレゴリオ暦[[1614年]][[10月10日]]） - [[千少庵]]、[[茶人]]（* [[1546年]]） * [[寛永]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1629年]][[10月23日]]） - [[原マルティノ]]、[[イエズス会]]司祭・[[天正遣欧使節]]副使 * [[寛文]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1668年]][[10月12日]]） - [[片山良庵]]、[[軍学者]]（* [[1601年]]） * [[宝暦]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1751年]][[10月25日]]） - [[並木宗輔]]、[[浄瑠璃]]作者（* [[1695年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1816年]][[10月27日]]） - [[山東京伝]]、[[戯作家]]（* [[1761年]]）
== Commemorations == * [[カジマヤー|カジマヤー祝い]] - [[沖縄県|沖縄]]では、数え年の97歳の長寿祝いに風車（カジマヤー）を持たせて祝う
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|9|6|9|8|8|7|10|9|0907}}

revision.text:
[[sn:September 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 7일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初七]] [[zh:九月初七]] [[en:draft:September 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Chishō|ja|治承}}4年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}}） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|源義仲}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}}3年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}}） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to {{ill|Minamoto no Sanemoto|ja|源実朝|lt=Sanemoto}}) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|建治}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}}） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|ja|北条時宗}}, executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}}5年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}}） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}5年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}}） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}}5年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|786|ja|786}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|嵯峨天皇}}, the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842}}).
* {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}}8年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1511|ja|1511}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日}}） – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|ja|松平清康}}, a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} († {{ill|1535|ja|1535}}).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政}}11年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1799|ja|1799}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}}） – {{ill|Minotsuku Genpo|ja|箕作阮甫}}, a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}}19年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}}） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵}}, a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546}}). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}}6年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}}） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ}}, a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}8年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}}） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵}}, a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601}}). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝暦}}元年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}}） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔}}, a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695}}). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}}13年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1816|ja|1816}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}}） – {{ill|Yamato Kyōden|ja|山東京伝}}, a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761}}).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|6|9|8|8|7|10|9|0907}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:September 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 8일]] [[ja:9月8日 (旧暦)]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:September 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 8일]] [[Category:Lunar September]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}}
[[Category:Butsumetsu]] [[Category:Days 8 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[sn:September 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 8일]] {{cdo:9 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)}} [[ja:9月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 8일]] {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)}} {{zh-yue:九月初八}} {{zh:九月初八}} [[en:draft:September 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[Category:new pages]] [[sn:September 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 8일]] {{cdo:9 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)}} [[ja:9月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 8일]] {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)}} {{zh-yue:九月初八}} {{zh:九月初八}} [[en:draft:September 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]

[[Category:Butsumetsu]] [[Category:Days 8 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[sn:September 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 8일]] {{cdo:9 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)}} [[ja:9月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 8일]] {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)}} {{zh-yue:九月初八}} {{zh:九月初八}} [[en:draft:September 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[Category:new pages]] [[sn:September 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 8일]] {{cdo:9 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)}} [[ja:9月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 8일]] {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)}} {{zh-yue:九月初八}} {{zh:九月初八}} [[en:draft:September 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]

[[sn:September 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 7일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初七]] [[zh:九月初七]] [[en:draft:September 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Chishō|ja|治承}}4年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}}） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|源義仲}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}}3年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}}） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to {{ill|Minamoto no Sanemoto|ja|源実朝|lt=Sanemoto}}) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|建治}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}}） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|ja|北条時宗}}, executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}}5年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}}） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}5年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}}） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}}5年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|786|ja|786}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|嵯峨天皇}}, the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842}}).
* {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}}8年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1511|ja|1511}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日}}） – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|ja|松平清康}}, a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} († {{ill|1535|ja|1535}}).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政}}11年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1799|ja|1799}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}}） – {{ill|Minotsuku Genpo|ja|箕作阮甫}}, a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}}19年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}}） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵}}, a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546}}). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}}6年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}}） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ}}, a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}8年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}}） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵}}, a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601}}). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝暦}}元年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}}） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔}}, a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695}}). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}}13年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1816|ja|1816}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}}） – {{ill|Yamato Kyōden|ja|山東京伝}}, a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761}}).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|6|9|8|8|7|10|9|0907}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}}19年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}}） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵}}, a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546}}). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}}6年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}}） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ}}, a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}8年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}}） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵}}, a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601}}). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝暦}}元年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}}） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔}}, a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695}}). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}}13年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1816|ja|1816}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}}） – {{ill|Yamato Kyōden|ja|山東京伝}}, a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761}}).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

[[sn:September 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 7일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初七]] [[zh:九月初七]] [[en:draft:September 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Chishō|ja|治承}}4年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}}） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|源義仲}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}}3年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}}） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to {{ill|Minamoto no Sanemoto|ja|源実朝|lt=Sanemoto}}) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|建治}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}}） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|ja|北条時宗}}, executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}}5年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}}） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}5年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}}） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}}5年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|786|ja|786}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|嵯峨天皇}}, the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842}}).
* {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}}8年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1511|ja|1511}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日}}） – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|ja|松平清康}}, a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} († {{ill|1535|ja|1535}}).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政}}11年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1799|ja|1799}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}}） – {{ill|Minotsuku Genpo|ja|箕作阮甫}}, a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863}}).

== Events == * {{ill|Chishō|ja|治承}}4年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}}） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|源義仲}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}}3年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}}） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to {{ill|Minamoto no Sanemoto|ja|源実朝|lt=Sanemoto}}) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|建治}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}}） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|ja|北条時宗}}, executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}}5年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}}） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}5年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}}） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.

* {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}}8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1511|ja|1511}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日}}） – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|ja|松平清康}}, a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} († {{ill|1535|ja|1535}}).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政}}11th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1799|ja|1799}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}}） – {{ill|Minotsuku Genpo|ja|箕作阮甫}}, a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}}19年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}}） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵}}, a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546}}). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}}6年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}}） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ}}, a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}}） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵}}, a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601}}). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝暦}}1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}}） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔}}, a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695}}). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}}13年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1816|ja|1816}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}}） – {{ill|Yamato Kyōden|ja|山東京伝}}, a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761}}).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

[[sn:September 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 7일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初七]] [[zh:九月初七]] [[en:draft:September 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Chishō|ja|治承}}4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}}） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|源義仲}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}}3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}}） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to {{ill|Minamoto no Sanemoto|ja|源実朝|lt=Sanemoto}}) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|建治}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}}） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|ja|北条時宗}}, executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}}5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}}） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}}） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}}5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|786|ja|786}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|嵯峨天皇}}, the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842}}).
* {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}}8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1511|ja|1511}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日}}） – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|ja|松平清康}}, a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} († {{ill|1535|ja|1535}}).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政}}11th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1799|ja|1799}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}}） – {{ill|Minotsuku Genpo|ja|箕作阮甫}}, a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}}19年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}}） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵}}, a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546}}). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}}6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}}） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ}}, a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}}） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵}}, a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601}}). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝暦}}1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}}） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔}}, a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695}}). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}}13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1816|ja|1816}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}}） – {{ill|Yamato Kyōden|ja|山東京伝}}, a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761}}).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

[[sn:September 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 7일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初七]] [[zh:九月初七]] [[en:draft:September 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Chishō|ja|治承}}4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}}） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|源義仲}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}}3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}}） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to {{ill|Minamoto no Sanemoto|ja|源実朝|lt=Sanemoto}}) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|建治}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}}） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|ja|北条時宗}}, executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}}5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}}） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}}） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}}5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|786|ja|786}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|嵯峨天皇}}, the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842}}).
* {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}}8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1511|ja|1511}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日}}） – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|ja|松平清康}}, a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} († {{ill|1535|ja|1535}}).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政}}11th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1799|ja|1799}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}}） – {{ill|Minotsuku Genpo|ja|箕作阮甫}}, a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}}19th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}}） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵}}, a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546}}). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}}6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}}） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ}}, a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}}） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵}}, a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601}}). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki}}1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}}） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔}}, a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695}}). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}}13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1816|ja|1816}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}}） – {{ill|Yamato Kyōden|ja|山東京伝}}, a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761}}).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chishō|ja|治承}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|源義仲}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to {{ill|Minamoto no Sanemoto|ja|源実朝|lt=Sanemoto}} ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|建治}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|ja|北条時宗}} , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|786|ja|786}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|嵯峨天皇}} , the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842}} ).
* {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1511|ja|1511}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日}} ） – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|ja|松平清康}} , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} († {{ill|1535|ja|1535}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 11th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1799|ja|1799}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ） – {{ill|Minotsuku Genpo|ja|箕作阮甫}} , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵}} , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}} ） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔}} , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1816|ja|1816}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ） – {{ill|Yamato Kyōden|ja|山東京伝}} , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

[[sn:September 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 7일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初七]] [[zh:九月初七]] [[en:draft:September 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chishō|ja|治承}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|源義仲}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to {{ill|Minamoto no Sanemoto|ja|源実朝|lt=Sanemoto}} ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|建治}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|ja|北条時宗}} , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|786|ja|786}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|嵯峨天皇}} , the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842}} ).
* {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1511|ja|1511}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日}} ） – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|ja|松平清康}} , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} († {{ill|1535|ja|1535}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 11th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1799|ja|1799}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ） – {{ill|Minotsuku Genpo|ja|箕作阮甫}} , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵}} , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}} ） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔}} , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1816|ja|1816}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ） – {{ill|Yamato Kyōden|ja|山東京伝}} , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

[[Category:Senbu]] [[Category:Days 7 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[sn:September 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 8일]] {{cdo:9 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)}} [[ja:9月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 8일]] {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)}} {{zh-yue:九月初八}} {{zh:九月初八}} [[en:draft:September 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[Category:new pages]] [[Category:qq]] [[sn:September 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[sn:September 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[sn:September 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[Category:qq]] [[sn:September 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 8일]] {{cdo:9 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)}} [[ja:9月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 8일]] {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)}} {{zh-yue:九月初八}} {{zh:九月初八}} [[en:draft:September 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:September 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:September 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:qq]]

[[sn:September 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 7일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初七]] [[zh:九月初七]] [[en:draft:September 7 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chishō|ja|治承}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|源義仲}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to {{ill|Minamoto no Sanemoto|ja|源実朝|lt=Sanemoto}} ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|建治}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|ja|北条時宗}} , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|786|ja|786}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|嵯峨天皇}} , the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842}} ).
* {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1511|ja|1511}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日}} ） – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|ja|松平清康}} , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} († {{ill|1535|ja|1535}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 11th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1799|ja|1799}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ） – {{ill|Minotsuku Genpo|ja|箕作阮甫}} , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵}} , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}} ） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔}} , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1816|ja|1816}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ） – {{ill|Yamato Kyōden|ja|山東京伝}} , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|6|9|8|8|7|10|9|0907}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chishō|ja|治承}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|源義仲}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to {{ill|Minamoto no Sanemoto|ja|源実朝|lt=Sanemoto}} ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|建治}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|ja|北条時宗}} , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|786|ja|786}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|嵯峨天皇}} , the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842}} ).
* {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1511|ja|1511}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日}} ） – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|ja|松平清康}} , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} († {{ill|1535|ja|1535}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 11th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1799|ja|1799}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ） – {{ill|Minotsuku Genpo|ja|箕作阮甫}} , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵}} , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}} ） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔}} , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1816|ja|1816}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ） – {{ill|Yamato Kyōden|ja|山東京伝}} , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

[[sn:September 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 7일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初七]] [[zh:九月初七]] [[en:draft:September 7 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chishō|ja|治承}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|源義仲}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to {{ill|Minamoto no Sanemoto|ja|源実朝|lt=Sanemoto}} ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|建治}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|ja|北条時宗}} , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|786|ja|786}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|嵯峨天皇}} , the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842}} ).
* {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1511|ja|1511}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日}} ） – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|ja|松平清康}} , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} († {{ill|1535|ja|1535}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 11th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1799|ja|1799}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ） – {{ill|Minotsuku Genpo|ja|箕作阮甫}} , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵}} , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}} ） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔}} , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1816|ja|1816}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ） – {{ill|Yamato Kyōden|ja|山東京伝}} , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.
== See Also ==

== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵}} , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}} ） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔}} , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1816|ja|1816}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ） – {{ill|Yamato Kyōden|ja|山東京伝}} , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

[[sn:September 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 7일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初七]] [[zh:九月初七]] [[en:draft:September 7 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chishō|ja|治承}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to {{ill|Minamoto no Sanemoto|ja|源実朝|lt=Sanemoto}} ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|ja|北条時宗}} , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|786|ja|786}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga}} , the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842}} ).
* {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1511|ja|1511}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日}} ） – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|ja|松平清康}} , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} († {{ill|1535|ja|1535}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 11th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1799|ja|1799}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ） – {{ill|Minotsuku Genpo|ja|箕作阮甫}} , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵}} , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}} ） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔}} , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1816|ja|1816}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ） – {{ill|Yamato Kyōden|ja|山東京伝}} , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

[[Category:Senbu]] [[Category:Days 7 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[sn:September 8 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 8일]] {{cdo:9 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)}} [[ja:9月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 8일]] {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)}} {{zh-yue:九月初八}} {{zh:九月初八}} [[en:draft:September 8 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:September 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:September 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:September 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:September 8 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 8일]] {{cdo:9 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)}} [[ja:9月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 8일]] {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)}} {{zh-yue:九月初八}} {{zh:九月初八}} [[en:draft:September 8 (Lunisolar)]] ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:11]][[sn:September 7 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:September 7 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:September 7 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]]

[[sn:September 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 7일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初七]] [[zh:九月初七]] [[en:draft:September 7 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chishō|ja|治承}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to {{ill|Minamoto no Sanemoto|ja|源実朝|lt=Sanemoto}} ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|ja|北条時宗}} , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|786|ja|786}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga}} , the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842}} ).
* {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1511|ja|1511}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日}} ） – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|ja|松平清康}} , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} († {{ill|1535|ja|1535}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 11th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1799|ja|1799}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ） – {{ill|Minotsuku Genpo|ja|箕作阮甫}} , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵}} , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}} ） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔}} , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1816|ja|1816}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ） – {{ill|Yamato Kyōden|ja|山東京伝}} , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|6|9|8|8|7|10|9|0907}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chishō|ja|治承}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to {{ill|Minamoto no Sanemoto|ja|源実朝|lt=Sanemoto}} ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|ja|北条時宗}} , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|786|ja|786}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga}} , the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842}} ).
* {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1511|ja|1511}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日}} ） – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|ja|松平清康}} , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} († {{ill|1535|ja|1535}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 11th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1799|ja|1799}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ） – {{ill|Minotsuku Genpo|ja|箕作阮甫}} , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵}} , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}} ） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔}} , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1816|ja|1816}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ） – {{ill|Yamato Kyōden|ja|山東京伝}} , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented. == See Also! ==

== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵}} , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}} ） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔}} , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1816|ja|1816}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ） – {{ill|Yamato Kyōden|ja|山東京伝}} , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

[[sn:September 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 7일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初七]] [[zh:九月初七]] [[en:draft:September 7 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chishō|ja|治承}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to {{ill|Minamoto no Sanemoto|ja|源実朝|lt=Sanemoto}} ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|ja|北条時宗}} , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|786|ja|786}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga}} , the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842}} ).
* {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1511|ja|1511}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日}} ） – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|ja|松平清康}} , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} († {{ill|1535|ja|1535}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 11th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1799|ja|1799}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ） – {{ill|Minotsuku Genpo|ja|箕作阮甫}} , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵}} , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}} ） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔}} , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1816|ja|1816}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ） – {{ill|Yamato Kyōden|ja|山東京伝}} , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

[[Category:Senbu]] [[Category:Days 7 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[sn:September 8 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 8일]] {{cdo:9 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)}} [[ja:9月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 8일]] {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)}} {{zh-yue:九月初八}} {{zh:九月初八}} [[en:draft:September 8 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]] [[sn:September 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:September 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:September 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:September 8 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 8일]] {{cdo:9 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)}} [[ja:9月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 8일]] {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)}} {{zh-yue:九月初八}} {{zh:九月初八}} [[en:draft:September 8 (Lunisolar)]] ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[sn:September 7 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:New]] [[sn:September 7 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:September 7 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:September 7 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:September 7 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]]

[[sn:September 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 7일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初七]] [[zh:九月初七]] [[en:draft:September 7 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chishō|ja|治承}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to {{ill|Minamoto no Sanemoto|ja|源実朝|lt=Sanemoto}} ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|ja|北条時宗}} , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|786|ja|786}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga}} , the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842}} ).
* {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1511|ja|1511}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日}} ） – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|ja|松平清康}} , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} († {{ill|1535|ja|1535}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 11th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1799|ja|1799}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ） – {{ill|Minotsuku Genpo|ja|箕作阮甫}} , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵}} , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}} ） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔}} , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1816|ja|1816}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ） – {{ill|Yamato Kyōden|ja|山東京伝}} , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|6|9|8|8|7|10|9|0907}}

[[sn:September 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 7일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初七]] [[zh:九月初七]] [[en:draft:September 7 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chishō|ja|治承}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to {{ill|Minamoto no Sanemoto|ja|源実朝|lt=Sanemoto}} ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|ja|北条時宗}} , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|786|ja|786}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga}} , the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842}} ).
* {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1511|ja|1511}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日}} ） – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|ja|松平清康}} , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} († {{ill|1535|ja|1535}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 11th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1799|ja|1799}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ） – {{ill|Minotsuku Genpo|ja|箕作阮甫}} , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵}} , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}} ） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔}} , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1816|ja|1816}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ） – {{ill|Yamato Kyōden|ja|山東京伝}} , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|6|9|8|8|7|10|9|0907}}

[[sn:September 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 7일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初七]] [[zh:九月初七]] [[en:draft:September 7 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chishō|ja|治承}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to {{ill|Minamoto no Sanemoto|ja|源実朝|lt=Sanemoto}} ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|ja|北条時宗}} , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|786|ja|786}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga}} , the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842}} ).
* {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1511|ja|1511}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日}} ） – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|ja|松平清康}} , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} († {{ill|1535|ja|1535}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 11th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1799|ja|1799}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ） – {{ill|Minotsuku Genpo|ja|箕作阮甫}} , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵}} , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}} ） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔}} , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1816|ja|1816}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ） – {{ill|Yamato Kyōden|ja|山東京伝}} , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761}} ).
