[[cdo:9 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初七]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chishō|ja|治承}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to {{ill|Minamoto no Sanemoto|ja|源実朝|lt=Sanemoto}} ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|ja|北条時宗}} , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|786|ja|786}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga}} , the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842}} ).
* {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1511|ja|1511}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日}} ） – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|ja|松平清康}} , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} († {{ill|1535|ja|1535}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 11th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1799|ja|1799}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日}} ） – {{ill|Minotsuku Genpo|ja|箕作阮甫}} , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵}} , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}} ） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔}} , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1816|ja|1816}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} ） – {{ill|Yamato Kyōden|ja|山東京伝}} , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

* {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1511|ja|1511|12=draft}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|ja|松平清康|12=draft}} , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康|12=draft}} († {{ill|1535|ja|1535|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft}} 11th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1799|ja|1799|12=draft}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Minotsuku Genpo|ja|箕作阮甫|12=draft}} , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 19th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614|12=draft}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵|12=draft}} , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|12=draft}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668|12=draft}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|12=draft}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751|12=draft}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔|12=draft}} , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|12=draft}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1816|ja|1816|12=draft}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Yamato Kyōden|ja|山東京伝|12=draft}} , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|12=draft}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

== Births == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|786|ja|786|12=draft}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga|12=draft}} , the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1511|ja|1511|12=draft}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|ja|松平清康|12=draft}} , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康|12=draft}} († {{ill|1535|ja|1535|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft}} 11th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1799|ja|1799|12=draft}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Minotsuku Genpo|ja|箕作阮甫|12=draft}} , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 19th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614|12=draft}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵|12=draft}} , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|12=draft}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668|12=draft}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|12=draft}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751|12=draft}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔|12=draft}} , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|12=draft}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1816|ja|1816|12=draft}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Yamato Kyōden|ja|山東京伝|12=draft}} , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|12=draft}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft|12=draft}} 11th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1799|ja|1799|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Minotsuku Genpo|ja|箕作阮甫|12=draft|12=draft}} , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 19th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵|12=draft|12=draft}} , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔|12=draft|12=draft}} , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|12=draft|12=draft}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1816|ja|1816|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Yamato Kyōden|ja|山東京伝|12=draft|12=draft}} , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|12=draft|12=draft}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初七]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chishō|ja|治承|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|12=draft|12=draft}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to {{ill|Minamoto no Sanemoto|ja|源実朝|lt=Sanemoto|12=draft|12=draft}} ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1275|ja|1275|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|ja|北条時宗|12=draft|12=draft}} , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|786|ja|786|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1511|ja|1511|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|ja|松平清康|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康|12=draft|12=draft}} († {{ill|1535|ja|1535|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft|12=draft}} 11th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1799|ja|1799|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Minotsuku Genpo|ja|箕作阮甫|12=draft|12=draft}} , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 19th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵|12=draft|12=draft}} , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔|12=draft|12=draft}} , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|12=draft|12=draft}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1816|ja|1816|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Yamato Kyōden|ja|山東京伝|12=draft|12=draft}} , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|12=draft|12=draft}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

* {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1511|ja|1511|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|ja|松平清康|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康|12=draft|12=draft}} († {{ill|1535|ja|1535|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft|12=draft}} 11th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1799|ja|1799|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Minotsuku Genpo|ja|箕作阮甫|12=draft|12=draft}} , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 19th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵|12=draft|12=draft}} , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔|12=draft|12=draft}} , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|12=draft|12=draft}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1816|ja|1816|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Yamato Kyōden|ja|山東京伝|12=draft|12=draft}} , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|12=draft|12=draft}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|6|9|8|8|7|10|9|0907}}

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初七]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chishō|ja|治承|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|12=draft|12=draft}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to {{ill|Minamoto no Sanemoto|ja|源実朝|lt=Sanemoto|12=draft|12=draft}} ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1275|ja|1275|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|ja|北条時宗|12=draft|12=draft}} , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|786|ja|786|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1511|ja|1511|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|ja|松平清康|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康|12=draft|12=draft}} († {{ill|1535|ja|1535|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft|12=draft}} 11th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1799|ja|1799|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Minotsuku Genpo|ja|箕作阮甫|12=draft|12=draft}} , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 19th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵|12=draft|12=draft}} , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔|12=draft|12=draft}} , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|12=draft|12=draft}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1816|ja|1816|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Yamato Kyōden|ja|山東京伝|12=draft|12=draft}} , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初七]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chishō|ja|治承|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|12=draft|12=draft}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to {{ill|Minamoto no Sanemoto|ja|源実朝|lt=Sanemoto|12=draft|12=draft}} ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1275|ja|1275|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|ja|北条時宗|12=draft|12=draft}} , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|786|ja|786|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1511|ja|1511|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|ja|松平清康|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康|12=draft|12=draft}} († {{ill|1535|ja|1535|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft|12=draft}} 11th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1799|ja|1799|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Minotsuku Genpo|ja|箕作阮甫|12=draft|12=draft}} , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 19th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵|12=draft|12=draft}} , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔|12=draft|12=draft}} , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|12=draft|12=draft}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1816|ja|1816|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Yamato Kyōden|ja|山東京伝|12=draft|12=draft}} , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|12=draft|12=draft}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|6|9|8|8|7|10|9|0907}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月7日'''（きゅうれきくがつなのか）は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の7日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[治承]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1180年]][[9月27日]]） - 木曾の[[源義仲]]が[[平家]]討伐の兵を挙げる * [[建仁]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1203年]][[10月13日]]） - 源千幡が[[征夷大将軍]]に任ぜられ、名を[[源実朝|実朝]]と改める * [[建治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1275年]][[9月27日]]） - [[鎌倉幕府]]執権・[[北条時宗]]が、入貢を要求した[[元 (王朝)|元]]の使者5人を斬殺 * [[慶長]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1600年]][[10月13日]]） - [[大津城]]に対して包囲攻撃を開始（[[大津城の戦い]]） * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[10月9日]]） - 東京～京都間に[[電信|電信線]]が開通
== 誕生日 == * [[延暦]]5年（ユリウス暦[[786年]][[10月3日]]） - [[嵯峨天皇]]、52代[[天皇]]（+ [[842年]]） * [[永正]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1511年]][[9月28日]]）- [[松平清康]]、[[戦国時代 (日本)|戦国時代]]の[[武将]]、[[徳川家康]]の祖父（+ [[1535年]]） * [[寛政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1799年]][[10月5日]]）- [[箕作阮甫]]、蘭学者（＋ [[1863年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[慶長]]19年（グレゴリオ暦[[1614年]][[10月10日]]） - [[千少庵]]、[[茶人]]（* [[1546年]]） * [[寛永]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1629年]][[10月23日]]） - [[原マルティノ]]、[[イエズス会]]司祭・[[天正遣欧使節]]副使 * [[寛文]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1668年]][[10月12日]]） - [[片山良庵]]、[[軍学者]]（* [[1601年]]） * [[宝暦]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1751年]][[10月25日]]） - [[並木宗輔]]、[[浄瑠璃]]作者（* [[1695年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1816年]][[10月27日]]） - [[山東京伝]]、[[戯作家]]（* [[1761年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 == * [[カジマヤー|カジマヤー祝い]] - [[沖縄県|沖縄]]では、数え年の97歳の長寿祝いに風車（カジマヤー）を持たせて祝う
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|6|9|8|8|7|10|9|0907}}

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[9月7日 (旧暦)]] to [[September 7 (Lunisolar)]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import

== できごと == * [[治承]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1180年]][[9月27日]]） - 木曾の[[源義仲]]が[[平家]]討伐の兵を挙げる * [[建仁]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1203年]][[10月13日]]） - 源千幡が[[征夷大将軍]]に任ぜられ、名を[[源実朝|実朝]]と改める * [[建治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1275年]][[9月27日]]） - [[鎌倉幕府]]執権・[[北条時宗]]が、入貢を要求した[[元 (王朝)|元]]の使者5人を斬殺 * [[慶長]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1600年]][[10月13日]]） - [[大津城]]に対して包囲攻撃を開始（[[大津城の戦い]]） * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[10月9日]]） - 東京～京都間に[[電信|電信線]]が開通
== 誕生日 == * [[延暦]]5年（ユリウス暦[[786年]][[10月3日]]） - [[嵯峨天皇]]、52代[[天皇]]（+ [[842年]]） * [[永正]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1511年]][[9月28日]]）- [[松平清康]]、[[戦国時代 (日本)|戦国時代]]の[[武将]]、[[徳川家康]]の祖父（+ [[1535年]]） * [[寛政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1799年]][[10月5日]]）- [[箕作阮甫]]、蘭学者（＋ [[1863年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[慶長]]19年（グレゴリオ暦[[1614年]][[10月10日]]） - [[千少庵]]、[[茶人]]（* [[1546年]]） * [[寛永]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1629年]][[10月23日]]） - [[原マルティノ]]、[[イエズス会]]司祭・[[天正遣欧使節]]副使 * [[寛文]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1668年]][[10月12日]]） - [[片山良庵]]、[[軍学者]]（* [[1601年]]） * [[宝暦]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1751年]][[10月25日]]） - [[並木宗輔]]、[[浄瑠璃]]作者（* [[1695年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1816年]][[10月27日]]） - [[山東京伝]]、[[戯作家]]（* [[1761年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 == * [[カジマヤー|カジマヤー祝い]] - [[沖縄県|沖縄]]では、数え年の97歳の長寿祝いに風車（カジマヤー）を持たせて祝う
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|6|9|8|8|7|10|9|0907}}

{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} .

== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

{{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Lunisolar September]] to [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chishō|ja|治承|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to {{ill|Minamoto no Sanemoto|ja|源実朝|lt=Sanemoto|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|1275|ja|1275|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|ja|北条時宗|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|1=Meiji era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|786|ja|786|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|1511|ja|1511|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ） – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|ja|松平清康|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} († {{ill|1535|ja|1535|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 11th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|1799|ja|1799|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ） – {{ill|Minotsuku Genpo|ja|箕作阮甫|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 19th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|1614|ja|1614|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ） – {{ill|Chisōan|ja|千少庵|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|1668|ja|1668|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|1751|ja|1751|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|ja|並木宗輔|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=}} .

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=}} .

{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=}} .

== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kajimayā Celebration|qq=}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.
== See Also ==

revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Chishō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1180|ja|1180|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1180|qq=}} [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshinaka|qq=}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1203|ja|1203|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1203|qq=}} [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to [[:en:Minamoto no Sanetomo|Sanemoto]] ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenchi|qq=}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1275|ja|1275|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1275|qq=}} [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, [[:en:Hōjō Tokimune|Hōjō Tokimune]] , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|ja|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō|qq=}} 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1600|ja|1600|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1600|qq=}} [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1872|ja|1872|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1872|qq=}} [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:786 (number)|786]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saga|qq=}} , the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/842|qq=}} ).
* [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1511|ja|1511|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1511|qq=}} [[:en:September 28|September 28]] ） – [[:en:Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu]] , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] († {{ill|1535|ja|1535|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1535|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=}} 11th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1799|ja|1799|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1799|qq=}} [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ） – [[:en:Mitsukuri Genpo|Minotsuku Genpo]] , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1863|qq=}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|ja|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō|qq=}} 19th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1614|ja|1614|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1614|qq=}} [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Sen Shōan|Chisōan]] , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1546|qq=}} ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1629|ja|1629|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1629|qq=}} [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Martino Hara|qq=}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 8th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1668|ja|1668|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1668|qq=}} [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katayama Ryōan|qq=}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1601|qq=}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki|1=Hōreki|2=ja|3=宝暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei|qq=}} 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1751|ja|1751|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1751|qq=}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Namiki Sōsuke|Namiki Sōsuke]] , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1695|qq=}} ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 13rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1816|ja|1816|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1816|qq=}} [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – [[:en:Santō Kyōden|Yamato Kyōden]] , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1761|qq=}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kajimayā Celebration|qq=}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|6|9|8|8|7|10|9|0907|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初八|qq=}} {{zh:九月初八|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初八|qq=}} {{zh:九月初八|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初七]]

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=}} .

== Births == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:786 (number)|786]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saga|qq=}} , the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/842|qq=}} ).
* [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1511|ja|1511|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1511|qq=}} [[:en:September 28|September 28]] ） – [[:en:Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu]] , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] († {{ill|1535|ja|1535|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1535|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=}} 11th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1799|ja|1799|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1799|qq=}} [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ） – [[:en:Mitsukuri Genpo|Minotsuku Genpo]] , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1863|qq=}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|ja|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō|qq=}} 19th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1614|ja|1614|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1614|qq=}} [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Sen Shōan|Chisōan]] , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1546|qq=}} ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1629|ja|1629|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1629|qq=}} [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Martino Hara|qq=}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 8th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1668|ja|1668|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1668|qq=}} [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katayama Ryōan|qq=}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1601|qq=}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki|1=Hōreki|2=ja|3=宝暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei|qq=}} 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1751|ja|1751|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1751|qq=}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Namiki Sōsuke|Namiki Sōsuke]] , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1695|qq=}} ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 13rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1816|ja|1816|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1816|qq=}} [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – [[:en:Santō Kyōden|Yamato Kyōden]] , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1761|qq=}} ).

== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Chishō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1180|ja|1180|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1180|qq=}} [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshinaka|qq=}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1203|ja|1203|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1203|qq=}} [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to [[:en:Minamoto no Sanetomo|Sanemoto]] ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenchi|qq=}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1275|ja|1275|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1275|qq=}} [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, [[:en:Hōjō Tokimune|Hōjō Tokimune]] , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|ja|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō|qq=}} 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1600|ja|1600|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1600|qq=}} [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1872|ja|1872|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1872|qq=}} [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:786 (number)|786]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saga|qq=}} , the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/842|qq=}} ).
* [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1511|ja|1511|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1511|qq=}} [[:en:September 28|September 28]] ） – [[:en:Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu]] , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] († {{ill|1535|ja|1535|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1535|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=}} 11th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1799|ja|1799|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1799|qq=}} [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ） – [[:en:Mitsukuri Genpo|Minotsuku Genpo]] , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1863|qq=}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|ja|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō|qq=}} 19th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1614|ja|1614|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1614|qq=}} [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Sen Shōan|Chisōan]] , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1546|qq=}} ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1629|ja|1629|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1629|qq=}} [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Martino Hara|qq=}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 8th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1668|ja|1668|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1668|qq=}} [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katayama Ryōan|qq=}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1601|qq=}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki|1=Hōreki|2=ja|3=宝暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei|qq=}} 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1751|ja|1751|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1751|qq=}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Namiki Sōsuke|Namiki Sōsuke]] , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1695|qq=}} ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 13rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1816|ja|1816|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1816|qq=}} [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – [[:en:Santō Kyōden|Yamato Kyōden]] , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1761|qq=}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kajimayā Celebration|qq=}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|ja|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō|qq=}} 19th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1614|ja|1614|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1614|qq=}} [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Sen Shōan|Chisōan]] , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1546|qq=}} ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1629|ja|1629|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1629|qq=}} [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Martino Hara|qq=}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 8th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1668|ja|1668|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1668|qq=}} [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katayama Ryōan|qq=}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1601|qq=}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki|1=Hōreki|2=ja|3=宝暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei|qq=}} 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1751|ja|1751|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1751|qq=}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Namiki Sōsuke|Namiki Sōsuke]] , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1695|qq=}} ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 13rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1816|ja|1816|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1816|qq=}} [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – [[:en:Santō Kyōden|Yamato Kyōden]] , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1761|qq=}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kajimayā Celebration|qq=}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.
== See Also ==

{{Not to be confused with|September 7 (Lunisolar)}}<!--hatnote--> {{Not to be confused with|September 7}}<!--hatnote--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Chishō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1180|ja|1180|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1180|qq=}} [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshinaka|qq=}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1203|ja|1203|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1203|qq=}} [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to [[:en:Minamoto no Sanetomo|Sanemoto]] ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenchi|qq=}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1275|ja|1275|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1275|qq=}} [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, [[:en:Hōjō Tokimune|Hōjō Tokimune]] , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|ja|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō|qq=}} 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1600|ja|1600|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1600|qq=}} [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1872|ja|1872|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1872|qq=}} [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:786|786]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saga|qq=}} , the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/842|qq=}} ).
* [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1511|ja|1511|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1511|qq=}} [[:en:September 28|September 28]] ） – [[:en:Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu]] , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] († {{ill|1535|ja|1535|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1535|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=}} 11th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1799|ja|1799|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1799|qq=}} [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ） – [[:en:Mitsukuri Genpo|Minotsuku Genpo]] , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1863|qq=}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|ja|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō|qq=}} 19th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1614|ja|1614|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1614|qq=}} [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Sen Shōan|Chisōan]] , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1546|qq=}} ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1629|ja|1629|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1629|qq=}} [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Martino Hara|qq=}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 8th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1668|ja|1668|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1668|qq=}} [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katayama Ryōan|qq=}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1601|qq=}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki|1=Hōreki|2=ja|3=宝暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei|qq=}} 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1751|ja|1751|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1751|qq=}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Namiki Sōsuke|Namiki Sōsuke]] , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1695|qq=}} ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 13rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1816|ja|1816|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1816|qq=}} [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – [[:en:Santō Kyōden|Yamato Kyōden]] , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1761|qq=}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kajimayā Celebration|qq=}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.
== See Also ==

* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=}} 11th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1799|ja|1799|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1799|qq=}} [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ） – [[:en:Mitsukuri Genpo|Minotsuku Genpo]] , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1863|qq=}} ).

== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kajimayā Celebration|qq=}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

revision.comment: Text replacement - "<!--hatnote-->" to "[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->"
revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|September 7|qq=September 7}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Chishō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1180|ja|1180|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1180|qq=}} [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshinaka|qq=}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1203|ja|1203|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1203|qq=}} [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to [[:en:Minamoto no Sanetomo|Sanemoto]] ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenchi|qq=}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1275|ja|1275|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1275|qq=}} [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, [[:en:Hōjō Tokimune|Hōjō Tokimune]] , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|ja|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō|qq=}} 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1600|ja|1600|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1600|qq=}} [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1872|ja|1872|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1872|qq=}} [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:786|786]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saga|qq=}} , the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/842|qq=}} ).
* [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1511|ja|1511|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1511|qq=}} [[:en:September 28|September 28]] ） – [[:en:Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu]] , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] († {{ill|1535|ja|1535|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1535|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=}} 11th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1799|ja|1799|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1799|qq=}} [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ） – [[:en:Mitsukuri Genpo|Minotsuku Genpo]] , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1863|qq=}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|ja|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō|qq=}} 19th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1614|ja|1614|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1614|qq=}} [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Sen Shōan|Chisōan]] , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1546|qq=}} ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1629|ja|1629|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1629|qq=}} [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Martino Hara|qq=}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 8th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1668|ja|1668|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1668|qq=}} [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katayama Ryōan|qq=}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1601|qq=}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki|1=Hōreki|2=ja|3=宝暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei|qq=}} 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1751|ja|1751|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1751|qq=}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Namiki Sōsuke|Namiki Sōsuke]] , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1695|qq=}} ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 13rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1816|ja|1816|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1816|qq=}} [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – [[:en:Santō Kyōden|Yamato Kyōden]] , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1761|qq=}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kajimayā Celebration|qq=}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|6|9|8|8|7|10|9|0907|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初八|qq=}} {{zh:九月初八|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初八|qq=}} {{zh:九月初八|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初七]]
{{translated page|ja|9月7日 (旧暦)|version=83320464|comment=Imported full ja history}}

== Births == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:786|786]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saga|qq=}} , the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|ja|842|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/842|qq=}} ).
* [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1511|ja|1511|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1511|qq=}} [[:en:September 28|September 28]] ） – [[:en:Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu]] , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] († {{ill|1535|ja|1535|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1535|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=}} 11th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1799|ja|1799|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1799|qq=}} [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ） – [[:en:Mitsukuri Genpo|Minotsuku Genpo]] , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|ja|1863|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1863|qq=}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|ja|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō|qq=}} 19th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1614|ja|1614|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1614|qq=}} [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Sen Shōan|Chisōan]] , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|ja|1546|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1546|qq=}} ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1629|ja|1629|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1629|qq=}} [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Martino Hara|qq=}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 8th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1668|ja|1668|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1668|qq=}} [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katayama Ryōan|qq=}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|ja|1601|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1601|qq=}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|Hōreki|1=Hōreki|2=ja|3=宝暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōei|qq=}} 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1751|ja|1751|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1751|qq=}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Namiki Sōsuke|Namiki Sōsuke]] , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|ja|1695|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1695|qq=}} ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 13rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1816|ja|1816|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1816|qq=}} [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – [[:en:Santō Kyōden|Yamato Kyōden]] , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|ja|1761|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1761|qq=}} ).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} .
