{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840249]] Wikidata name: 7th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 7|qq=September 7}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Chishō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshinaka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to [[:en:Minamoto no Sanetomo|Sanemoto]] ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenchi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to KENJI|1=Kenchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11227770}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1275|1275]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, [[:en:Hōjō Tokimune|Hōjō Tokimune]] , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:786|786]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , the 52nd emperor († [[:en:842|842]] ).
* [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:September 28|September 28]] ） – [[:en:Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu]] , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] († [[:en:1535|1535]] ).
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 11th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1799|1799]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ） – [[:en:Mitsukuri Genpo|Minotsuku Genpo]] , a rangaku scholar († [[:en:1863|1863]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Sen Shōan|Chisōan]] , a tea master (* [[:en:1546|1546]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Martino Hara|qq=|1=Martinão Hara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11409356}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 8th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1668|1668]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katayama Ryōan|qq=|1=Katayama Ryōan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11569640}} , a military scholar (* [[:en:1601|1601]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1751|1751]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Namiki Sōsuke|Namiki Sōsuke]] , a jōruri author (* [[:en:1695|1695]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 13rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1816|1816]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – [[:en:Santō Kyōden|Yamato Kyōden]] , a writer of popular fiction (* [[:en:1761|1761]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kajimayā Celebration|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Sen Shōan|Chisōan]] , a tea master (* [[:en:1546|1546]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Martino Hara|qq=|1=Martinão Hara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11409356}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 8th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1668|1668]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katayama Ryōan|qq=|1=Katayama Ryōan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11569640}} , a military scholar (* [[:en:1601|1601]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1751|1751]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Namiki Sōsuke|Namiki Sōsuke]] , a jōruri author (* [[:en:1695|1695]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 13rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1816|1816]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – [[:en:Santō Kyōden|Yamato Kyōden]] , a writer of popular fiction (* [[:en:1761|1761]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kajimayā Celebration|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840249]] Wikidata name: 7th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 7|qq=September 7}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Chishō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshinaka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to [[:en:Minamoto no Sanetomo|Sanemoto]] ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenchi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to KENJI|1=Kenchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11227770}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1275|1275]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, [[:en:Hōjō Tokimune|Hōjō Tokimune]] , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:786|786]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , the 52nd emperor († [[:en:842|842]] ).
* [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:September 28|September 28]] ） – [[:en:Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu]] , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] († [[:en:1535|1535]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Chishō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshinaka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to [[:en:Minamoto no Sanetomo|Sanemoto]] ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenchi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to KENJI|1=Kenchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11227770}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1275|1275]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, [[:en:Hōjō Tokimune|Hōjō Tokimune]] , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:786|786]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , the 52nd emperor († [[:en:842|842]] ).
* [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:September 28|September 28]] ） – [[:en:Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu]] , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] († [[:en:1535|1535]] ).
* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 11th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1799|1799]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ） – [[:en:Mitsukuri Genpo|Minotsuku Genpo]] , a rangaku scholar († [[:en:1863|1863]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Sen Shōan|Chisōan]] , a tea master (* [[:en:1546|1546]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Martino Hara|qq=|1=Martinão Hara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11409356}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 8th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1668|1668]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katayama Ryōan|qq=|1=Katayama Ryōan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11569640}} , a military scholar (* [[:en:1601|1601]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1751|1751]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Namiki Sōsuke|Namiki Sōsuke]] , a jōruri author (* [[:en:1695|1695]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 13rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1816|1816]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – [[:en:Santō Kyōden|Yamato Kyōden]] , a writer of popular fiction (* [[:en:1761|1761]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kajimayā Celebration|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Chishō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshinaka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to [[:en:Minamoto no Sanetomo|Sanemoto]] ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenchi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to KENJI|1=Kenchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11227770}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1275|1275]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, [[:en:Hōjō Tokimune|Hōjō Tokimune]] , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:786|786]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , the 52nd emperor († [[:en:842|842]] ).
* [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:September 28|September 28]] ） – [[:en:Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu]] , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] († [[:en:1535|1535]] ).
* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 11th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1799|1799]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ） – [[:en:Mitsukuri Genpo|Minotsuku Genpo]] , a rangaku scholar († [[:en:1863|1863]] ).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Chishō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshinaka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to [[:en:Minamoto no Sanetomo|Sanemoto]] ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenchi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to KENJI|1=Kenchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11227770}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1275|1275]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, [[:en:Hōjō Tokimune|Hōjō Tokimune]] , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:786|786]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , the 52nd emperor († [[:en:842|842]] ).
* [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:September 28|September 28]] ） – [[:en:Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu]] , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] († [[:en:1535|1535]] ).
* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 11th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1799|1799]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ） – [[:en:Mitsukuri Genpo|Minotsuku Genpo]] , a rangaku scholar († [[:en:1863|1863]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Sen Shōan|Chisōan]] , a tea master (* [[:en:1546|1546]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Martino Hara|qq=|1=Martinão Hara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11409356}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 8th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1668|1668]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katayama Ryōan|qq=|1=Katayama Ryōan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11569640}} , a military scholar (* [[:en:1601|1601]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1751|1751]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Namiki Sōsuke|Namiki Sōsuke]] , a jōruri author (* [[:en:1695|1695]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 13rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1816|1816]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – [[:en:Santō Kyōden|Yamato Kyōden]] , a writer of popular fiction (* [[:en:1761|1761]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kajimayā Celebration|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Sen Shōan|Chisōan]] , a tea master (* [[:en:1546|1546]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Martino Hara|1=Martinão Hara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11409356}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 8th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1668|1668]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katayama Ryōan|1=Katayama Ryōan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11569640}} , a military scholar (* [[:en:1601|1601]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1751|1751]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Namiki Sōsuke|Namiki Sōsuke]] , a jōruri author (* [[:en:1695|1695]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 13rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1816|1816]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – [[:en:Santō Kyōden|Yamato Kyōden]] , a writer of popular fiction (* [[:en:1761|1761]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kajimayā Celebration|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Chishō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to [[:en:Minamoto no Sanetomo|Sanemoto]] ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenchi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to KENJI|1=Kenchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11227770}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1275|1275]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, [[:en:Hōjō Tokimune|Hōjō Tokimune]] , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Chishō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to [[:en:Minamoto no Sanetomo|Sanemoto]] ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenchi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to KENJI|1=Kenchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11227770}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1275|1275]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, [[:en:Hōjō Tokimune|Hōjō Tokimune]] , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:786|786]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , the 52nd emperor († [[:en:842|842]] ).
* [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:September 28|September 28]] ） – [[:en:Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu]] , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] († [[:en:1535|1535]] ).
* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 11th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1799|1799]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ） – [[:en:Mitsukuri Genpo|Minotsuku Genpo]] , a rangaku scholar († [[:en:1863|1863]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Sen Shōan|Chisōan]] , a tea master (* [[:en:1546|1546]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Martino Hara|1=Martinão Hara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11409356}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 8th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1668|1668]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katayama Ryōan|1=Katayama Ryōan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11569640}} , a military scholar (* [[:en:1601|1601]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1751|1751]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Namiki Sōsuke|Namiki Sōsuke]] , a jōruri author (* [[:en:1695|1695]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 13rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1816|1816]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – [[:en:Santō Kyōden|Yamato Kyōden]] , a writer of popular fiction (* [[:en:1761|1761]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kajimayā Celebration|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|6|9|8|8|7|10|9|0907|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初八|qq=}} {{zh:九月初八|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初八|qq=}} {{zh:九月初八|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初七]][[zh:九月初七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840249]] Wikidata name: 7th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 7|qq=September 7}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Chishō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to [[:en:Minamoto no Sanetomo|Sanemoto]] ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenchi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to KENJI|1=Kenchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11227770}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1275|1275]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, [[:en:Hōjō Tokimune|Hōjō Tokimune]] , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:786|786]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , the 52nd emperor († [[:en:842|842]] ).
* [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:September 28|September 28]] ） – [[:en:Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu]] , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] († [[:en:1535|1535]] ).
* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 11th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1799|1799]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ） – [[:en:Mitsukuri Genpo|Minotsuku Genpo]] , a rangaku scholar († [[:en:1863|1863]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Sen Shōan|Chisōan]] , a tea master (* [[:en:1546|1546]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Martino Hara|1=Martinão Hara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11409356}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 8th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1668|1668]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katayama Ryōan|1=Katayama Ryōan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11569640}} , a military scholar (* [[:en:1601|1601]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1751|1751]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Namiki Sōsuke|Namiki Sōsuke]] , a jōruri author (* [[:en:1695|1695]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 13rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1816|1816]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – [[:en:Santō Kyōden|Yamato Kyōden]] , a writer of popular fiction (* [[:en:1761|1761]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kajimayā Celebration|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|6|9|8|8|7|10|9|0907|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初八|qq=}} {{zh:九月初八|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初八|qq=}} {{zh:九月初八|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Sen Shōan|Chisōan]] , a tea master (* [[:en:1546|1546]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Martino Hara|1=Martinão Hara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11409356}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 8th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1668|1668]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katayama Ryōan|1=Katayama Ryōan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11569640}} , a military scholar (* [[:en:1601|1601]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1751|1751]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Namiki Sōsuke|Namiki Sōsuke]] , a jōruri author (* [[:en:1695|1695]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 13rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1816|1816]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – [[:en:Santō Kyōden|Yamato Kyōden]] , a writer of popular fiction (* [[:en:1761|1761]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kajimayā Celebration|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Chishō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to [[:en:Minamoto no Sanetomo|Sanemoto]] ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenchi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to KENJI|1=Kenchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11227770}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1275|1275]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, [[:en:Hōjō Tokimune|Hōjō Tokimune]] , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Chishō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to [[:en:Minamoto no Sanetomo|Sanemoto]] ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenchi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to KENJI|1=Kenchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11227770}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1275|1275]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, [[:en:Hōjō Tokimune|Hōjō Tokimune]] , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:786|786]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , the 52nd emperor († [[:en:842|842]] ).
* [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:September 28|September 28]] ） – [[:en:Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu]] , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] († [[:en:1535|1535]] ).
* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 11th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1799|1799]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ） – [[:en:Mitsukuri Genpo|Minotsuku Genpo]] , a rangaku scholar († [[:en:1863|1863]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Sen Shōan|Chisōan]] , a tea master (* [[:en:1546|1546]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Martino Hara|1=Martinão Hara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11409356}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 8th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1668|1668]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katayama Ryōan|1=Katayama Ryōan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11569640}} , a military scholar (* [[:en:1601|1601]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1751|1751]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Namiki Sōsuke|Namiki Sōsuke]] , a jōruri author (* [[:en:1695|1695]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 13rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1816|1816]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – [[:en:Santō Kyōden|Yamato Kyōden]] , a writer of popular fiction (* [[:en:1761|1761]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kajimayā Celebration|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初七]][[zh:九月初七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840249]] Wikidata name: 7th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 7|qq=September 7}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Chishō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to [[:en:Minamoto no Sanetomo|Sanemoto]] ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenchi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to KENJI|1=Kenchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11227770}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1275|1275]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, [[:en:Hōjō Tokimune|Hōjō Tokimune]] , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:786|786]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , the 52nd emperor († [[:en:842|842]] ).
* [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:September 28|September 28]] ） – [[:en:Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu]] , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] († [[:en:1535|1535]] ).
* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 11th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1799|1799]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ） – [[:en:Mitsukuri Genpo|Minotsuku Genpo]] , a rangaku scholar († [[:en:1863|1863]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Sen Shōan|Chisōan]] , a tea master (* [[:en:1546|1546]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Martino Hara|1=Martinão Hara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11409356}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 8th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1668|1668]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katayama Ryōan|1=Katayama Ryōan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11569640}} , a military scholar (* [[:en:1601|1601]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1751|1751]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Namiki Sōsuke|Namiki Sōsuke]] , a jōruri author (* [[:en:1695|1695]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 13rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1816|1816]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – [[:en:Santō Kyōden|Yamato Kyōden]] , a writer of popular fiction (* [[:en:1761|1761]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kajimayā Celebration|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Chishō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to [[:en:Minamoto no Sanetomo|Sanemoto]] ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenchi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to KENJI|1=Kenchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11227770}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1275|1275]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, [[:en:Hōjō Tokimune|Hōjō Tokimune]] , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:786|786]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , the 52nd emperor († [[:en:842|842]] ).
* [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:September 28|September 28]] ） – [[:en:Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu]] , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] († [[:en:1535|1535]] ).
* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 11th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1799|1799]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ） – [[:en:Mitsukuri Genpo|Minotsuku Genpo]] , a rangaku scholar († [[:en:1863|1863]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Sen Shōan|Chisōan]] , a tea master (* [[:en:1546|1546]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Martino Hara|1=Martinão Hara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11409356}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 8th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1668|1668]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katayama Ryōan|1=Katayama Ryōan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11569640}} , a military scholar (* [[:en:1601|1601]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1751|1751]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Namiki Sōsuke|Namiki Sōsuke]] , a jōruri author (* [[:en:1695|1695]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 13rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1816|1816]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – [[:en:Santō Kyōden|Yamato Kyōden]] , a writer of popular fiction (* [[:en:1761|1761]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kajimayā Celebration|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.
== See Also ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 7일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月初七]][[zh:九月初七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 7일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月初七]][[zh:九月初七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初七]][[zh:九月初七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840249]] Wikidata name: 7th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 7|qq=September 7}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Chishō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to [[:en:Minamoto no Sanetomo|Sanemoto]] ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenchi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to KENJI|1=Kenchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11227770}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1275|1275]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, [[:en:Hōjō Tokimune|Hōjō Tokimune]] , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:786|786]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , the 52nd emperor († [[:en:842|842]] ).
* [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:September 28|September 28]] ） – [[:en:Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu]] , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] († [[:en:1535|1535]] ).
* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 11th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1799|1799]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ） – [[:en:Mitsukuri Genpo|Minotsuku Genpo]] , a rangaku scholar († [[:en:1863|1863]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Sen Shōan|Chisōan]] , a tea master (* [[:en:1546|1546]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Martino Hara|1=Martinão Hara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11409356}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 8th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1668|1668]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katayama Ryōan|1=Katayama Ryōan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11569640}} , a military scholar (* [[:en:1601|1601]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1751|1751]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Namiki Sōsuke|Namiki Sōsuke]] , a jōruri author (* [[:en:1695|1695]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 13rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1816|1816]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – [[:en:Santō Kyōden|Yamato Kyōden]] , a writer of popular fiction (* [[:en:1761|1761]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kajimayā Celebration|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Chishō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to [[:en:Minamoto no Sanetomo|Sanemoto]] ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenchi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to KENJI|1=Kenchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11227770}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1275|1275]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, [[:en:Hōjō Tokimune|Hōjō Tokimune]] , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:786|786]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , the 52nd emperor († [[:en:842|842]] ).
* [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:September 28|September 28]] ） – [[:en:Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu]] , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] († [[:en:1535|1535]] ).
* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 11th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1799|1799]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]] ） – [[:en:Mitsukuri Genpo|Minotsuku Genpo]] , a rangaku scholar († [[:en:1863|1863]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ） – [[:en:Sen Shōan|Chisōan]] , a tea master (* [[:en:1546|1546]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Martino Hara|1=Martinão Hara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11409356}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 8th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1668|1668]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katayama Ryōan|1=Katayama Ryōan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11569640}} , a military scholar (* [[:en:1601|1601]] ). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1751|1751]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Namiki Sōsuke|Namiki Sōsuke]] , a jōruri author (* [[:en:1695|1695]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 13rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1816|1816]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]] ） – [[:en:Santō Kyōden|Yamato Kyōden]] , a writer of popular fiction (* [[:en:1761|1761]] ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kajimayā Celebration|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Jishō|en|Jishō|WD=Q1194671|lt=Chishō}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1180|en|1180|WD=Q19702|lt=1180}} {{ill|September 27|en|September 27|WD=Q2884|lt=September 27}} ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * {{ill|Kennin|en|Kennin|WD=Q1195433|lt=Kennin}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1203|en|1203|WD=Q5227|lt=1203}} {{ill|October 13|en|October 13|WD=Q2925|lt=October 13}} ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to {{ill|Minamoto no Sanetomo|en|Minamoto no Sanetomo|WD=Q174249|lt=Sanemoto}} ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenchi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to KENJI|1=Kenchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11227770}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1275|en|1275|WD=Q5529|lt=1275}} {{ill|September 27|en|September 27|WD=Q2884|lt=September 27}} ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|en|Hōjō Tokimune|WD=Q430964|lt=Hōjō Tokimune}} , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600}} {{ill|October 13|en|October 13|WD=Q2925|lt=October 13}} ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872}} {{ill|October 9|en|October 9|WD=Q2923|lt=October 9}} ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|786|en|786|WD=Q30307|lt=786}} {{ill|October 3|en|October 3|WD=Q2931|lt=October 3}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|en|842|WD=Q24730|lt=842}} ).
* {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1193577|lt=Eishō}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1511|en|1511|WD=Q6188|lt=1511}} {{ill|September 28|en|September 28|WD=Q2883|lt=September 28}} ） – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|en|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|WD=Q1041434|lt=Matsudaira Kiyoyasu}} , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|WD=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} († {{ill|1535|en|1535|WD=Q6453|lt=1535}} ).
* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 11th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1799|en|1799|WD=Q7827|lt=1799}} {{ill|October 5|en|October 5|WD=Q2930|lt=October 5}} ） – {{ill|Mitsukuri Genpo|en|Mitsukuri Genpo|WD=Q6532054|lt=Minotsuku Genpo}} , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1863|en|1863|WD=Q7701|lt=1863}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 19th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1614|en|1614|WD=Q6781|lt=1614}} {{ill|October 10|en|October 10|WD=Q2921|lt=October 10}} ） – {{ill|Sen Shōan|en|Sen Shōan|WD=Q7449900|lt=Chisōan}} , a tea master (* {{ill|1546|en|1546|WD=Q6533|lt=1546}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1629|en|1629|WD=Q6847|lt=1629}} {{ill|October 23|en|October 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23}} ） – {{ill|Martino Hara|ja|原マルティノ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Martino Hara|1=Martinão Hara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11409356}} , a Jesuit priest and deputy of the Tenshō Mission. * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|WD=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun}} 8th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1668|en|1668|WD=Q7595|lt=1668}} {{ill|October 12|en|October 12|WD=Q2920|lt=October 12}} ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katayama Ryōan|1=Katayama Ryōan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11569640}} , a military scholar (* {{ill|1601|en|1601|WD=Q6725|lt=1601}} ). * {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|WD=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1751|en|1751|WD=Q7615|lt=1751}} {{ill|October 25|en|October 25|WD=Q2954|lt=October 25}} ） – {{ill|Namiki Sōsuke|en|Namiki Sōsuke|WD=Q1964334|lt=Namiki Sōsuke}} , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|en|1695|WD=Q7696|lt=1695}} ). * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka (era)}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1816|en|1816|WD=Q6953|lt=1816}} {{ill|October 27|en|October 27|WD=Q2956|lt=October 27}} ） – {{ill|Santō Kyōden|en|Santō Kyōden|WD=Q938347|lt=Yamato Kyōden}} , a writer of popular fiction (* {{ill|1761|en|1761|WD=Q7649|lt=1761}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kajimayā Celebration|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Jishō|en|Jishō|WD=Q1194671|lt=Chishō}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1180|en|1180|WD=Q19702|lt=1180}} {{ill|September 27|en|September 27|WD=Q2884|lt=September 27}} ） – In Kiso, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} raised an army to defeat the Heike. * {{ill|Kennin|en|Kennin|WD=Q1195433|lt=Kennin}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1203|en|1203|WD=Q5227|lt=1203}} {{ill|October 13|en|October 13|WD=Q2925|lt=October 13}} ） – Minamoto no Sanetomo (renamed from his original name to {{ill|Minamoto no Sanetomo|en|Minamoto no Sanetomo|WD=Q174249|lt=Sanemoto}} ) was appointed as Seii Taishōgun. * {{ill|Kenchi|ja|Kenji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenchi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to KENJI|1=Kenchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11227770}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1275|en|1275|WD=Q5529|lt=1275}} {{ill|September 27|en|September 27|WD=Q2884|lt=September 27}} ） – The Kamakura shogunate’s regent, {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|en|Hōjō Tokimune|WD=Q430964|lt=Hōjō Tokimune}} , executed five envoys from the Yuan dynasty who had demanded tribute. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600}} {{ill|October 13|en|October 13|WD=Q2925|lt=October 13}} ） – A siege was launched against Ōtsu Castle (the Battle of Ōtsu Castle). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872}} {{ill|October 9|en|October 9|WD=Q2923|lt=October 9}} ） – A telegraph line was opened between Tokyo and Kyoto.
== Births == * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|786|en|786|WD=Q30307|lt=786}} {{ill|October 3|en|October 3|WD=Q2931|lt=October 3}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|en|842|WD=Q24730|lt=842}} ).
* {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1193577|lt=Eishō}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1511|en|1511|WD=Q6188|lt=1511}} {{ill|September 28|en|September 28|WD=Q2883|lt=September 28}} ） – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|en|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|WD=Q1041434|lt=Matsudaira Kiyoyasu}} , a Sengoku-period warrior and grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|WD=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} († {{ill|1535|en|1535|WD=Q6453|lt=1535}} ).

{{ill|1668|en|1668|WD=Q7595|lt=1668}} {{ill|October 12|en|October 12|WD=Q2920|lt=October 12}} ） – {{ill|Katayama Ryōan|ja|片山良庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katayama Ryōan|1=Katayama Sōsuke|WD=Q1964334|lt=Namiki Sōsuke}} , a jōruri author (* {{ill|1695|en|1695|WD=Q7696|lt=1695}} ). * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka (era)}} 13rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1816|en|1816|WD=Q6953|lt=1816}} {{ill|October 27|en|October 27|WD=Q2956|lt=October 27}} ） – {{ill|Santō Kyōden|en|Santō Kyōden|WD=Q938347|lt=Yamato It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .

== Births == * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|786|en|786|WD=Q30307|lt=786}} {{ill|October 3|en|October 3|WD=Q2931|lt=October 3}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Saga|ja|Emperor Saga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , the 52nd emperor († {{ill|842|en|842|WD=Q24730|lt=842}} ).

== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kajimayā Celebration|ja|カジマヤー祝い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kajimayā Celebration|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – In Okinawa, a 97‐year‐old (by traditional count) longevity celebration is held in which a windmill (カジマヤー) is presented.
